text:
du -h /usr/local/lib   =  17G    9.0
The same with 8.2  = 3.9 G
With 9.0 /usr/local/lib/libreoffice =5.2 G 
and /usr/local/lib/thunderbird = 2.7

I forgot something ?

best regards

Gerard


I use CVS for updates 
cvsup -g -L 2 standard-supfile

make fetchindex
portupgrade -aR
